item.title: RacingPost: Racing Post @RacingPost · 23min The Post's former editor and chief executive on a pivotal moment for racing's media land
item.description:
Racing Post @RacingPost · 23min The Post's former editor and chief executive on a pivotal moment for racing's media landscape
Read with Racing Post+ racingpost.com The intense battle between the Racing Post and The Sporting Life - and my decision that won it The Post's former editor and chief executive on a pivotal moment for racing's media landscape 1 1 1 mil

item.title:
BenStarSports: AK BETS reposteó Ben Keith @BenStarSports · 45min Quote of The Day:
"It's really important to understand when you have
item.description:
AK BETS reposteó Ben Keith @BenStarSports · 45min Quote of The Day:
"It's really important to understand when you have lost your edge. And it's really important, when you've got an edge, & it's not apparent to others, that you press it, & that you press it hard."
Anthony Kaminskas @AKBets Cita Star Sports Bookmakers @StarSports_Bet · 20h | #Top10 ANTHONY KAMINSKAS
What do you think of punters now that you're a bookie?
What's a good bookmaker to you?
What is your favourite book?
Pro punter-turned-bookmaker @AKBets faces ten questions from @BenStarSports! 3 3 928

item.title: tony_calvin: Tony Calvin @tony_calvin · 52min COPY for all nine ITV races on Saturday will be done by 1.30pm, I'd have thought, as I
item.description: Tony Calvin @tony_calvin · 52min COPY for all nine ITV races on Saturday will be done by 1.30pm, I'd have thought, as I am out the door then and no idea when I will return.... Six races done in here - will tweet again when finalised, fwiw; De tips.akbets.co.uk 395

item.title:
bet365: bet365 @bet365 · 1h 'Man City will go 𝗼𝗱𝗱𝘀-𝗼𝗻'
We've forecasted the Outright prices for the Premier League title based
item.description:
bet365 @bet365 · 1h 'Man City will go 𝗼𝗱𝗱𝘀-𝗼𝗻'
We've forecasted the Outright prices for the Premier League title based on all three outcomes at the Etihad. De bet365.com 1 6 1 mil
